arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid star’s injury absence extended into November
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid star Marcos Llorente could see his injury absence extended into November. The Spain international was forced off at half time in Los Rojiblancos’ 4-0 UEFA Champions League defeat away at Benfica on October 2. The initial prognosis was positive, with no major injury detected, and a month-long recovery predicted for a muscular overload.
